metadata.description: Test cases for the pure orphan-reconcile decision

literal.string: deletes only the stale owned .json file
empty keep-set with prefix restriction still deletes only owned .json
segment-wise prefix match rejects hydra/javax sibling
deletes every non-kept, non-protected file regardless of ext or prefix
protected manifest survives even when absent from keep-set
empty keep-set + prefix restriction yields empty plan when nothing observed under prefix
protect exact-match: sibling with same basename in another dir is NOT protected
deep nesting no-op: everything kept => empty plan
keepPathsForModules maps each module to its .json path
ownedPrefixes drops single-segment modules (no second-level dir)
Test cases for the pure orphan-reconcile decision
